comment.label: button "Search"
comment.text: Replace the current search with a server-side fuzzy search. In lib/job-filters.ts expose an exported fuzzyScore helper that returns an integer score for a job/query match, support typo-tolerant near matches, and update sortJobsForDirectory to accept an optional q argument so results rank by fuzzy score when q is present. Structured matches in company/role/tags should score above incidental rawText mentions, so a Backend Engineer role ranks ahead of a Designer posting that merely mentions backend engineer in the body. A completely unrelated Designer/Product Design posting must score 0 for the query 'backend enginer'. Wire DirectoryPage to call sortJobsForDirectory(filtered, sort, filters.q) or sortJobsForDirectory(filtered, sort, q), and keep the existing filters working with search.
